corpus_baseline_measured.note: Counts generated by scripts/l_source_watch_build.py from corpus/silver/inscriptions_structured.json and cross_script.data; not hand-written (Invariant 12).

eig_scale.definition: Ordinal expected-information-gain rank BEFORE acquisition. HIGH = would materially move a value-layer verdict or supply genuine held-out grading gold; MED = adds independent constraints or breaks equivalence classes without deciding a layer; LOW = mostly redundant with held sources or dependency-contaminated.
eig_scale.hard_ceiling_note: Per prior campaigns (linear-a-constraint-expansion), internal evidence is relabeling-invariant: NO monolingual corpus acquisition can by itself authorize SEMANTIC+ licences. Corpus growth raises falsification power and breaks structural degeneracies; it does not lift value-layer underdetermination. Only a bilingual or >=3 independent held-out anchors can. EIG is scored on that honest basis.

candidates.name: Anetaki II — editio princeps of KN Zg 57/58 (ivory scepter/ring + repository)
candidates.ref: A. Kanta (ed.), Anetaki II: the Neopalatial Room 1 and the Ivory Repository (The Religious Center of the City of Knossos, Vol. 1), Philadelphia: INSTAP Academic Press, forthcoming.
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: Still unpublished. 2024 Ariadne overview (Kanta/Nakassis/Palaima/Perna) prints NO transliteration; March-2026 press coverage still frames it as unpublished/undeciphered. No 2026 edition located.
candidates.constraints_added_est: A single ~119-sign continuous text ~= 3x the current longest LA inscription; adds dense within-text n-gram / positional context and a large formula-grammar test window.
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Positional C/V degeneracies (long run gives new fixed-position contrasts); word-boundary / segmentation ambiguities in a monolingual continuous text; possibly some sign-ID (allograph) calls via new autopsy.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: The only registered source that supplies genuine PROSPECTIVE held-out gold: grades every pre-frozen Anetaki prediction (Chiapello 2024 ARCHIVED, Rjabchikov 2025 quarantined, Di Mino 2026 quarantined) with zero circularity. Falsification power, not value recovery — still monolingual, so authorizes no SEMANTIC+ licence by itself.
candidates.automation_feasibility: LOW — print monograph -> manual/OCR transliteration extraction, then structured-JSON ingest via the post_gorila_additions parser (editorial-mark fidelity required).
candidates.monitoring_trigger: INSTAP Academic Press catalogue; Kanta/Nakassis/Palaima publication feeds; KO-RO-NO-WE-SA follow-ups; WorldCat/library new-monograph alerts.

candidates.name: New Linear A inscriptions + joins (post-2021 find stream)
candidates.ref: Del Freo periodic 'Rapport sur les textes' (KO-RO-NO-WE-SA / BCH / SMEA); primary editiones principes of new finds; new physical joins of GORILA fragments.
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: Del Freo 2024 rapport ingested (TEXT_EXTRACTED). Del Freo 2024 'A new look at the LM I(B) administrative horizon' (SMEA) noted; no 2025-2026 rapport located online. Future finds unavailable until published.
candidates.constraints_added_est: Each new inscription extends held-out supply; joins merge fragments into longer sequences (n-gram context up).
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Joins collapse word-boundary ambiguity at fracture points; new sites break site-clustered confounds in positional stats.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Held-out supply frontier: newly-uncovered inscriptions are the Linear-B-new-tablet standard for grading (Invariant 3). Individually small; cumulatively the only organic path to more effective_n.
candidates.automation_feasibility: MED — same post_gorila_additions structured parser once a transliteration exists; find-reports need manual triage.
candidates.monitoring_trigger: Del Freo rapport cycle; BCH Chronique des fouilles; SMEA / Kadmos issues; INSTAP East-Crete newsletters (Kentro).

candidates.name: Re-editions / corrigenda of GORILA tablets (sign-reading corrections)
candidates.ref: Corrigenda in Salgarella 2020/2022, Salgarella-Judson 2024, SigLA autopsy vs GORILA; future GORILA-successor editions.
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: Ferrara 'Cretan Hieroglyphic Sign Repertoires: Yesterday, Today and Tomorrow' flags active sign-list revision work; no LA GORILA-successor edition located.
candidates.constraints_added_est: Resolves dotted/uncertain signs -> fewer masked positions in the modelling substrate.
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Splits/merges allograph equivalence classes; reduces label noise that inflates the null.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Cleans the substrate (lower L1 noise raises the ceiling of every downstream relative-phonology test) but adds no new text; contaminated by the GORILA lineage so cannot serve as an independent anchor.
candidates.automation_feasibility: MED — diff against held silver; requires a reconciliation map, not a fresh parse.
candidates.monitoring_trigger: SigLA changelog; Salgarella/Judson output; Kadmos corrigenda.

candidates.name: SigLA palaeographic database version bumps
candidates.ref: E. Salgarella & S. Castellan, SigLA (https://sigla.phis.me/), CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Snapshot 2026-07-03 held (802 docs / 376 signs).
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: Live; no new changelog beyond held snapshot located this cycle. Related DBAS-CHS (Florence) actively updated for the hieroglyphic/seal side.
candidates.constraints_added_est: New glyph bounding boxes / hand drawings; independent SHAPE channel (not sound).
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Refines allograph classes; symmetry-breaking channel #2 candidate for seal design (WP-G/J).
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Independent (value-agnostic) palaeographic channel already exploited; version bumps add incremental shape evidence and support the >=2-independent-channel requirement. No values.
candidates.automation_feasibility: HIGH — existing scripts/sigla_decode.py (OCaml Marshal -> JSON); re-run on new database.js.
candidates.monitoring_trigger: sigla.phis.me database.js hash / site changelog; Cambridge repository.

candidates.name: Cretan Hieroglyphic updates (synthesis + new seals + sign-list rationalization)
candidates.ref: Civitillo, Ferrara & Meissner (eds), Cretan Hieroglyphic, CUP 2024 (ISBN 9781009490108); new seal KN S(4/4) 01 (2025); CHIC (Olivier-Godart 1996).
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: CUP 2024 synthesis reviewed BMCR 2026.01.17 (overview, NOT a new corpus edition). New hieroglyphic seal analyses circulating 2025. DBAS-CHS catalogues 300+ seals/nodules.
candidates.constraints_added_est: Sister-script (value-undeciphered) structural comparandum; independent of Ventris lineage.
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Cross-script shape/structure priors for symmetry-breaking; does not directly break LA classes.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Genuinely independent comparandum (undeciphered => no value contamination), but structural-only and one script removed; supports cross-script channel design, decides no LA layer.
candidates.automation_feasibility: LOW — synthesis prose; CHIC would need structured extraction if acquired.
candidates.monitoring_trigger: CUP catalogue; Ferrara/Civitillo output; DBAS-CHS updates.

candidates.name: Cypro-Minoan corpus / sign-repertoire updates
candidates.ref: S. Ferrara, Cypro-Minoan Inscriptions (2012/2013); HoChyMin; Corazza et al. Sign2Vec 2022.
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: No new CM edition located this cycle; ongoing Sign2Vec-style computational work continues.
candidates.constraints_added_est: LA-descended undeciphered sister script; structural comparandum + detector calibration target.
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: None on LA directly; validates that shape-clustering detectors fire on a related script.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: One script removed, undeciphered, structural-only; useful as a negative/positive control, not a constraint source for LA values.

candidates.name: Sign catalogues / rationalized sign lists (LA inventory)
candidates.ref: Salgarella 2022 combinatory (re-)classification; Ferrara sign-repertoire work; GORILA sign index.
candidates.constraints_added_est: Fixes the true sign inventory size -> the parameter/information-budget denominator (real syllabary ~=92, not 259).
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Merges/splits sign classes -> directly changes effective_n and unicity budget.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Denominator hygiene: a wrong sign count silently inflates or deflates every significance figure (Invariant 7). Corrects overfitting risk rather than adding text.

candidates.name: Onomastic / toponym indexes (Younger lexicon + successors)
candidates.ref: J. G. Younger, Linear A Lexicon (2023 Wayback); place-name equations (PA-I-TO, SU-KI-RI-TA, DI-KI-TE).
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: Younger's Kansas-hosted LA/CH corpora went OFFLINE (BMCR 2026.01.17 postscript confirms host withdrawal). Only Wayback captures survive -> ingest from held archive, do NOT rely on live URL.
candidates.constraints_added_est: Toponym anchors — but every one rides on GORILA homomorphic values.
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: None independently; contaminated by the value lineage it would test.
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Dependency-contaminated: grading a value hypothesis with GORILA-derived toponyms is circular (Art. XII). Kept for decontamination indexing, not as evidence.
candidates.automation_feasibility: HIGH (already archived JSON) but capped -> use as litindex decontamination only.
candidates.monitoring_trigger: Any re-host of Younger corpora; new toponym-equation publications.

candidates.name: Museum high-resolution image / autopsy releases
candidates.ref: Heraklion Archaeological Museum, INSTAP Study Center imaging; CMS seal imaging.
candidates.web_status_2026_07_07: No systematic new LA raster release located; scepter imagery remains press-photo level pending Anetaki II.
candidates.constraints_added_est: Independent visual channel for allograph/damaged-sign re-reading.
candidates.equivalence_classes_broken_est: Can resolve damaged-sign identity (masked positions -> observed).
candidates.power_gain_rationale: Shape channel only; high value if paired with a new/long inscription (e.g. scepter photos), marginal otherwise.
candidates.automation_feasibility: MED — image pipeline exists (sign_images/ manifest), but per-inscription registration is manual.
